core_payload.content:
# Symphony Agent Session

## 1. Role
Symphony Agent Session is the durable live execution envelope for one coding-agent conversation inside one repository assignment, visible across terminal, web, mobile, and control-plane surfaces while work is still in flight.

## 2. Session Contract
Sessions carry assignment handles, richer event and artifact projection, degraded-state visibility, clearer return paths, and stronger linkage between session telemetry, review requests, and downstream operator surfaces.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Symphony tracks a live thread through a searchable, accountable session object whose running state, outputs, failures, and recovery paths remain visible throughout execution.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Symphony Agent Session supports To Dig Deep by making live coding work stateful, inspectable, and attributable while it is still happening.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Symphony Agent Session defines the durable live execution envelope for repository work inside N1Hub. It ties assignment handles, active turns, artifact projection, degraded-session visibility, and cross-surface continuity into one inspectable session object that can remain legible across terminal, web, mobile, and control-plane views. The capsule matters because live coding work should not disappear into transient chat threads. It gives running work a stable operational identity so supervision, recovery, review, and downstream artifact routing can stay accountable while execution is still in flight.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Removed meta-language so Symphony Agent Session states session doctrine directly.
